description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.11 Docker image (and a dynamic python:$IMAGE for the matrix job) with a global before_script that runs pip install poetry and poetry install --with dev, and cache the /root/.cache directory. Define three stages: style, test, and package. In the style stage add a ruff job that uses python:3.11, runs poetry run tox -e ruff, and is allowed to fail. In the test stage add a coverage job that uses python:3.11, runs poetry run pytest --cov --cov-report html:htmlcov --cov-report term --cov-report xml:coverage.xml --junitxml=report.xml, allows failure, and uploads coverage.xml as a Cobertura coverage report and report.xml as a JUnit artifact with the provided coverage regex; also add a tests job that runs in parallel across a matrix of COMMAND values (py38‑py313) and matching IMAGE tags (3.8‑3.13), uses the image python:$IMAGE, and executes poetry run tox -e $COMMAND. In the package stage add a build job that uses python:3.11, runs poetry build, and stores the dist/ directory as an artifact.
